stemHtml:
You are flying VFR to an aerodrome that only has GNSS-based procedures available. You check the availability of the satellites before departure. At what point must you ensure that full satellite availability is met in order to continue your flight?

Given times:

Take-off: 13:00
Top of descent (ToD): 14:40
Start of the approach: 14:50
Arrival at destination: 15:00
